headlines.title: Cruz’ing through the terminal: A&K Robotics lands $8M for autonomous mobility
headlines.summary: Investment is led by Business Development Bank of Canada’s Industrial Innovation Venture Fund and Vantage Futures to expand production and R&D capacity.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle autonomous, robot ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Visa, Mastercard face new suit over card fees
headlines.summary: Three plaintiffs say a 2019 settlement in card fee litigation should not give the card networks years of legal immunity for antitrust claims.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, odeme aglari ve stablecoin tarafinda rekabetin sertlestigini ve finans altyapisinda yeni guc dengeleri olustugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Odeme ve finans altyapisindaki degisim yeni kazananlari ve islem akisini yeniden kurar. Bu sinyal özellikle mastercard, settlement ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Pudu Robotics raises nearly $150M as it targets industrial applications
headlines.summary: Pudu plans to use the funding to develop its embodied AI, grow its product portfolio, and expand in global markets beyond service robots.

headlines.title: Reliable Robotics raises funding for fully automated aircraft
headlines.summary: Reliable Robotics has raised $160 million as it continues to develop and work toward FAA certification for its Reliable Autonomy System for civilian and military aircraft.

political_items.title: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
political_items.summary: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.

political_items.title: US soldier charged after winning $400,000 betting on removal of Maduro

political_items.title: Woman killed by bear in Polish forest, son and local government say

topic_router.label: Robotik
topic_router.reason: Robotik şirketleri, depo otomasyonu, humanoid gelişmeler ve sanayi kullanımlarını daha odaklı verir.
topic_router.mode: Niş bir alan olduğu için önce uzman yayına git, büyük piyasa etkisi varsa sonra geniş teknoloji kaynağına bak.

topic_router.label: YZ Modelleri
topic_router.reason: Model savaşı, şirket içi hamleler, ürün stratejisi ve yatırım akışlarını erken okumak için çok güçlü.
